name: pixflow-design-plugin-authoring
title: Plugin authoring
description: Guided scenario for creating a local Pixflow Design plugin folder that can be added to My plugins.

description_i18n.en: Guided scenario for creating a local Pixflow Design plugin folder that can be added to My plugins.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 引导式场景：创建一个本地 Pixflow Design 插件文件夹，可加到「我的插件」。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 引導式場景：建立一個本地 Pixflow Design 外掛資料夾，可加到「我的外掛」。
description_i18n.ja: My plugins に追加できる、ローカル Pixflow Design プラグインフォルダを作成するためのガイド付きシナリオ。
description_i18n.ko: My plugins에 추가할 수 있는 로컬 Pixflow Design 플러그인 폴더를 만드는 가이드 시나리오.
description_i18n.de: Geführtes Szenario zum Anlegen eines lokalen Pixflow-Design-Plugin-Ordners, den du zu My plugins hinzufügen kannst.
description_i18n.fr: Scénario guidé pour créer un dossier de plugin Pixflow Design local à ajouter dans My plugins.
description_i18n.ru: Сценарий-гид для создания локальной папки Pixflow Design плагина, которую можно добавить в My plugins.
description_i18n.es: Escenario guiado para crear una carpeta de plugin de Pixflow Design local que puedes añadir a My plugins.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Cenário guiado para criar uma pasta de plugin Pixflow Design local que pode ser adicionada a My plugins.
description_i18n.it: Scenario guidato per creare una cartella di plugin Pixflow Design locale da aggiungere a My plugins.
description_i18n.vi: Kịch bản hướng dẫn tạo thư mục plugin Pixflow Design cục bộ để thêm vào My plugins.
description_i18n.pl: Kreator scenariusz tworzenia lokalnego folderu wtyczki Pixflow Design, który można dodać do My plugins.
description_i18n.id: Skenario terpandu untuk membuat folder plugin Pixflow Design lokal yang bisa ditambahkan ke My plugins.
description_i18n.nl: Begeleid scenario voor het maken van een lokale Pixflow Design-plug-inmap die je aan My plugins kunt toevoegen.
description_i18n.ar: سيناريو موجَّه لإنشاء مجلد إضافة Pixflow Design محلي يمكن إضافته إلى My plugins.
description_i18n.tr: My plugins'e eklenebilen yerel bir Pixflow Design eklenti klasörü oluşturmak için rehberli senaryo.
description_i18n.uk: Покроковий сценарій створення локальної теки плагіна Pixflow Design, яку можна додати до My plugins.

query.en: Create an Pixflow Design plugin for {{pluginGoal}}. Produce a folder named generated-plugin with SKILL.md, pixflow-design.json, and any useful examples or assets. Follow docs/plugins-spec.md and finish with a readiness summary plus next actions: Add to My plugins, Publish repo, or Pixflow Design PR.
query.zh-CN: 为 {{pluginGoal}} 创建一个 Pixflow Design 插件。请生成名为 generated-plugin 的文件夹，包含 SKILL.md、pixflow-design.json，以及有用的 examples 或 assets。遵循 docs/plugins-spec.md，并在最后总结它是否可以添加到 My plugins，同时给出下一步操作：添加到 My plugins、发布仓库或创建 Pixflow Design PR。

inputs.name: pluginGoal
inputs.default: a reusable workflow described by the user's prompt
inputs.label: Plugin goal
inputs.placeholder: turn a brand brief into a launch landing page workflow
